tasks.build: deno task build:web && deno task embed
tasks.start: deno task build && deno run -A server/main.js
tasks.compile: deno task build && deno compile -A --no-check --include server/worker.js --include server/embedded.js --output sqlite-gui server/main.js
tasks.bundle: deno task compile && deno run -A scripts/bundle.js
